---
title: "Sir William Arthur Heathcote 7th Bt., S.J."
---

## Sir William Arthur Heathcote 7th Bt., S.J.

**Dates:** (1853-1924)

### Description

priest

### Biography

He was grandson of Sir William Heathcote, 5th Bt..

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
